notes: Recent SETHLUI review states the stall serves only Katong-style laksa and lists small and large bowl prices. Burpple, Tripadvisor and other local listings corroborate the address, single-dish menu and laksa ingredients, but there is no official restaurant menu page found.

items.name: Katong Laksa Small
items.description: Katong-style laksa with coconut gravy, prawns, cockles, fish cake, bean sprouts and sambal.

items.name: Katong Laksa Large
items.description: Larger portion of Katong-style laksa with extra noodles and ingredients.

notes: Official menu page publishes food and drinks as menu images; readable item names and prices were cross-checked against Chope's September Coffee menu-image listing and public menu mirrors such as SGMYFoodie.

items.name: Parma Brie French Toast
items.description: Brioche French toast with parma ham, grilled peach, caramelised onions and whipped brie.

items.name: Smoked Salmon Sammie
items.description: Focaccia sandwich with smoked Norwegian salmon, house-made cream cheese, greens and fries.

items.name: Fried Chicken French Toast
items.description: Fried chicken with spicy maple, pickled shallots and brioche French toast.

items.name: Aburi Scallops Udon
items.description: Cold udon with glazed aburi scallops, cod roe, ikura, ebiko and yuzu shoyu.

items.name: Mentaiko Udon
items.description: Cold udon with sweet shrimps, cod roe, cream, ikura and nori.

items.name: Beef Ragu
items.description: Conchiglie pasta with Angus beef brisket, cream, sous-vide egg and parmigiano reggiano.

items.name: Crab Linguine
items.description: Linguine with crab meat, spicy lemon garlic butter, ebiko and nori.

items.name: Gula Melaka Latte
items.description: Double espresso with house-made gula melaka, toasted coconut and fresh milk.

notes: Foodpanda outlet page for The Apricus Coffee & Food Co. Jalan Kayu lists current delivery categories, item names, descriptions and prices. Prices may reflect delivery-platform pricing.

items.name: The Populus Scramble
items.description: Scrambled eggs with herbs, marinated feta, turkey bacon and toasted croissant.

items.name: Populus All Day Big Breakly
items.description: Poached eggs with hollandaise, multigrain toast, mushrooms, greens and baked beans.

items.name: Spring Pancake & Fried Chicken
items.description: Spring onion corn pancake with fried chicken thigh and house ranch dressing.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Tempura Atlantic halibut with paprika fries, truffle tartar sauce, lemon and greens.

items.name: Grass Fed Beef Burger
items.description: Grass-fed beef burger with gruyere, chilli coriander jam, mustard mayo, pickles and fries.

items.name: Norwegian Salmon Brown Butter Linguine
items.description: Linguine with dukkah-spiced salmon, fennel apple slaw, brown butter and kombu dust.

items.name: Seafood Linguine
items.description: Linguine braised in lobster bisque with crab meat, scallops, tobiko and tomatoes.

items.name: Cold White Brew
items.description: Cold white coffee brew with fixed sugar level.

place_name: Bangkok Street Mookata - Ang Mo Kio
notes: Official Bangkok Street Mookata ordering site lists mookata sets, meats, seafood, vegetables, sides and drinks with prices. Foodpanda outlet pages corroborate the Ang Mo Kio branch and a similar current delivery menu; some a la carte items are listed as from-prices.

items.name: Mookata Set Platter for 2
items.description: Raw mookata platter for two with mixed meats, seafood, vegetables, noodles and egg.

items.name: Mookata Set Platter for 3-4
items.description: Raw mookata platter for three to four diners with meats, seafood, vegetables and sides.

items.name: A4 Japanese Wagyu Beef
items.description: A la carte A4 Japanese wagyu beef for grilling.

items.name: Sirloin Beef Cube
items.description: A la carte sirloin beef cubes; official site lists from S$12.

items.name: Marinated Pork Collar

items.name: Marinated Garlic Chicken
